arts.sum: The homegrown 19-year-old has been absent since picking up a muscular issue in training in February.

arts.sum: Manchester United have decided to earmark Jean-Philippe Mateta as a back-up option to Liam Delap as they go in search of firepower

arts.sum: Manchester City and United played out what has been regarded as one of the worst games of the season as they drew 0-0 at Old Trafford - a result that did neither team's season any favours.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'handed major boost' in pursuit of Everton star Jarrad Branthwaite
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly ready to sell Manchester United-linked Jarrad Branthwaite during this summer's transfer window for a fee in the region of £50m.

arts.sum: Nemanja Matić and André Onana are in a war of words prior to the start of Manchester United vs. Lyon in the Europa League quarterfinals.

arts.ttl: Napoli and Manchester United’s Target Keeps Shining
arts.sum: Dan Ndoye was a hot commodity in January and last summer, when Napoli, Manchester United, and Inter took turns in tracking him, but he and Bologna agreed to continue together, which has been highly beneficial. arts.ttl: Is Onana Manchester United's worst ever goalkeeper?
arts.sum: Namanja Matic says Andre Onana is 'one of the worst' goalkeepers in Manchester United's history. The BBC Sport Ask Me Anything team take a look at the stats.
